description: Infinite grid of twisted, rounded columns stretching into fog. Brutalist architecture meets the void.
example_prompts: create infinite grid of twisted columns disappearing into fog
build brutalist architecture scene with repeating rounded pillars
compose infinite column array with gentle twist and exponential fog

camera.notes: Camera at eye level between columns

screenshot_metadata.notes: Use exponential fog density 0.1. Repeat period [4, 100, 4]. Twist rate 0.3.
